commit_scope: Binary proof that the host kernel uses every resource it has, as close to the metal as currently available: one Form program exercises CPU bit/float/many-core organs, native dispatch (jit_compile + register_jit rewire), the RAM organ (volatile cells, now three-way), real filesystem, real loopback TCP, the host clock, /dev/urandom entropy, and the offered-but-unplugged world-net doors. Proven three-way at validate.sh AND as a compiled .fkb artifact each kernel executes natively; the Go arm additionally compiles the band's metal-fact recipe to a host-native ELF x86-64 .so via the host Go toolchain.

results.binary_mode: 1023, 1 ok, 0 divergent — the same program as one .fkb artifact executed natively by each kernel
results.go_native_so: jit_compile(metal-fact) emitted /tmp/form-jit-*/plugin.so — ELF 64-bit LSB shared object, x86-64, built by the host Go toolchain from the Form recipe during the band run

parity_repairs_landed: form-kernel-ts: volatile_cell_put/get/delete/scan_since/prune_before ported (RAM organ now carried by all three siblings)
form-kernel-ts: unix_ms_to_iso_utc ported (second-resolution ISO UTC, matching go)
form-kernel-rust: volatile_cell_scan_since aligned to go's (key value updated_ms) triple shape
form-kernel-rust + form-kernel-ts: ML vector trio ported (dot_product, magnitude, vector_cosine — IEEE 754 binary64 end to end, go semantics)
form-kernel-rust + form-kernel-ts: jit_compile_value offered as an honest 0-stub (1 compiled, 0 not-compiled-here, -1 missing) so the Value-ABI door never crashes a sibling

jit_span_band.results: 255, 1 ok, 0 divergent in source mode AND --binary — IEEE float, string, and ML vector recipes walk, ask for Value-ABI native compilation (go compiles to a host .so; rust/ts answer honest 0), and yield identical values across dispatch paths and kernels

jit_assembly_audit.minimum_gates: M0 value parity (fact(10)=3628800 post-compile) · M1 symbol exported · M2 arithmetic native inside the plugin (imul in jitabi.Mul, no foreign hops) · M3 native self-call recursion — all PASS 2026-06-10
jit_assembly_audit.reading: the Value-ABI JIT is fully native (every call stays inside the .so) but boxed: 80-byte Value structs dominate the instruction stream and arithmetic rides intra-plugin jitabi helper calls. The de-boxing/inlining work is the measured distance, re-read by re-running the audit after each JIT improvement.

cross_isa_assembly_audit.emitter: form-kernel-go/jit_c.go — kernel-native jit_emit_c lowers the recipe to freestanding C (int64 subset mirroring jit.go); rust/ts offer honest empty-string stubs
cross_isa_assembly_audit.minimum_gates_2026_06_10: M0 value parity (emitted C computes walker answers on this host) · every target organ emits its ISA's real multiply · recursion fully native on CPU/DSP (lowered to loops, zero calls) — all PASS
named_edges: Metal AIR bytes and on-GPU execution need Apple hardware; the emitted MSL kernel source is the GPU half, the arm64-apple assembly stream is the MLX host half
physical DSP/GPU execution: emulation is proven; silicon is the organ

transformer_block_2026_06_10.architecture_as_data: form-stdlib/transformer-kernel.fk — (tk-arch 8 2 4 16) projects a full pre-LN multi-head attention + SiLU FFN block to one freestanding, division-free IEEE-binary32 C unit (Newton recip/rsqrt, no libcalls, no libm); three-way band tests/transformer-kernel-band.fk verdict 127
transformer_block_2026_06_10.checksum: f740120e — FNV-1a-32 over output bit patterns, identical on x86 host, qemu-aarch64 (Android CPU), qemu-hexagon (Android DSP)

isa_table.amd-gpu gcn: 3 insns — the GPU compiler constant-folded the whole block to v_mov_b32 0xf740120e: bit-exactness proven at compile time
isa_table.vector lanes: AVX-512 vmulps, RISC-V V vfmul sighted

serving_loop_2026_06_10.shape: what an inference server does, as the same recipe data: tk-emit-lm projects embeddings + L causal pre-LN blocks + final LN + byte-vocab logits + greedy argmax + sliding context into the same freestanding C unit; toy LCG weights, prompt "form", 12 greedy tokens
serving_loop_2026_06_10.result: token stream 15b6db6218d7f352122cb642 (checksum f0395211) identical on host x86, qemu-aarch64 (Android CPU), and qemu-hexagon (Android DSP) — whole-stream agreement, since greedy argmax over bit-exact floats forks loudly on any divergence
serving_loop_2026_06_10.next_toward_ollama: real weights (GGUF via read_file_bytes) replacing the LCG; a real tokenizer; the existing kernel-http door serving tk_generate

real_model_tokens_per_second_2026_06_10.model: HuggingFace karpathy/tinyllamas stories15M.bin (15M params, float32, Llama-2 architecture: dim 288, 6 layers, 6 heads, vocab 32000) + llama2.c tokenizer
real_model_tokens_per_second_2026_06_10.engine: tk-emit-llama in transformer-kernel.fk — RMSNorm, RoPE, KV cache, SwiGLU, shared classifier, greedy decode projected from recipe data into one C unit; band verdict 511 three-way
real_model_tokens_per_second_2026_06_10.correctness_witness: greedy decode from BOS yields the canonical 'Once upon a time, there was a little girl named Lily' opening — real learned weights speaking through the projected engine

ollama_comparison_same_host_same_model.ollama_version: 0.30.7 (cpu runner, 4 threads, stories15M GGUF imported via Modelfile, temperature 0, 100 tokens)
ollama_comparison_same_host_same_model.reading: all engines emit the identical greedy text. On a 15M f32 model the recipe-projected single-thread engine runs ~2.4x ollama's 4-thread rate and within 4% of run.c — ollama/llama.cpp carry server, graph, and thread-sync overheads built for billion-param models, which dominate at tiny sizes. The honest claim is parity with hand-written C at this scale, not victory over llama.cpp at 7B.

cross_isa_assembly_audit.jit_tmp_dir_finding: a full validate.sh suite left 12,665 /tmp/form-jit-* dirs (~29GB) and filled the disk mid-suite; jit.go keeps each MkdirTemp dir for process lifetime but nothing reclaims them across runs — content-addressed dir reuse (bodyKey-named dirs, atomic rename) would make them a persistent cache instead of sediment

execution_and_gpu_doors_2026_06_10.android_cpu_executed: freestanding static aarch64 binary of the emitted recipes ran under qemu-aarch64 — exit 42 (fact(10)==3628800 && poly(3,4)==25 computed by the ISA)
execution_and_gpu_doors_2026_06_10.android_dsp_executed: freestanding static hexagon binary ran under qemu-hexagon — exit 42 (parity computed by mpyi semantics)
execution_and_gpu_doors_2026_06_10.vulkan_android_gpu_spirv: clang --target=spirv64 via llvm-spirv-18 — 3 OpIMul, spirv-val clean
execution_and_gpu_doors_2026_06_10.apple_mlx_gpu_msl: Metal kernel source emitted from the same projection and held by clang as C++ on this host
execution_and_gpu_doors_2026_06_10.tools: qemu-user, llvm-spirv-18, spirv-tools installed in-session; the audit SKIPs honestly where they are absent

named_edges_left_open: int literals truncate at 32 bits in every kernel; the ts walker's add wraps at 32 bits while go and rust carry int64 — the band keeps constants inside int32; widening the integer model is its own movement
pg_* natives are carried by go and rust only; the ts carrier does not offer the pg port yet, so the parity band checks http_get and socket_listen offers
register_jit binds form-names to registered natives only; arithmetic verbs live in the walker, not the native table

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.notes: Kernel-local proof band; no production surface changes.
